meaning: adj.快的,迅速的,敏捷的,急剧的,活泼的adv.快n.活人,生物,要点,本质,核心,感觉敏锐的部位
examples: Come on! Quick! They'll see us!
She gave him a quick glance.
Credit controls were lifted in October and banks have been quick to turn on the tap.
Quick to adjust, the company refreshed inventory and began an earnings recovery later in the year.
